description: Wire the unattended review-gate resolution into Scheduler.RunWavedAsync (#120): at an unreviewed wave, read plan.Config.Autonomy.GateThresholds.ReviewGate — ProceedUnreviewed (Option P) records a proceeded-unreviewed decision + runs the wave; the default (Escalate, Option E) records a review-gate escalation via the shipped IEscalationSink + halts the wave. The harness NEVER writes a review marker on a human's behalf (§5 floor 3). Makes the authored SchedulerReviewGateTests pass.
